summary: Frontend testing BLOCKED by PostgreSQL database connection failure (localhost:5432). Code review completed for 'Mapa dos Contentores' feature improvements. Implementation appears correct but could not be validated due to environment issue.

critical.issue: Database connection refused - PostgreSQL not running on localhost:5432. This is an ENVIRONMENT ISSUE, not a code bug.

modo_normal_bloqueado.notes: mapa_modo_edicao session state controls draggability. In normal mode (false), contentores have 'clickable' class, not 'draggable'

clique_abre_inventario.notes: openInventory() function creates modal overlay with inventory panel showing garanhao, proprietario, quantidade, canister, andar, observacoes

painel_inventario_conteudo.notes: Panel shows: Total de palhetas, Total de lotes, and for each lote: Garanhao, Proprietario, Quantidade, Canister, Andar, Observacoes

botao_editar_mapa.notes: Button 'Editar mapa' activates edit mode via st.session_state['mapa_modo_edicao'] = True

botao_salvar_layout.notes: Button 'Salvar layout' reads localStorage positions, calls atualizar_posicao_contentor() to persist x,y to DB, returns to normal mode

layout_desktop.notes: st.columns([1, 3]) creates description left (1/4), map right (3/4) layout

layout_mobile.notes: is_mobile detection via streamlit_js_eval viewport width. Mobile layout uses vertical stack with full width map

technical_implementation.drag_mechanism: Mouse events (mousedown, mousemove, mouseup) with localStorage for pending positions
technical_implementation.persistence_flow: Drag -> localStorage -> Click 'Salvar layout' -> atualizar_posicao_contentor() -> PostgreSQL
technical_implementation.edit_mode_toggle: st.session_state['mapa_modo_edicao'] controls CSS class (draggable vs clickable)

critical_code_review_comments: ORPHANED CODE: Lines 2249-2761 contain a duplicate 'Mapa dos Contentores' implementation that is unreachable due to st.stop() at line 2244. This dead code should be removed.
The inventory panel (inv-panel) shows all required fields: garanhao, proprietario, quantidade, canister, andar, observacoes - PASS
Two modes correctly implemented: normal mode (clickable, opens inventory) and edit mode (draggable) - PASS
Salvar layout button correctly persists positions via atualizar_posicao_contentor() - PASS
Desktop layout uses st.columns([1, 3]) for description left, map right - PASS
Mobile detection via viewport width < 900px with vertical layout - PASS
action_items: ENVIRONMENT: PostgreSQL database must be running on localhost:5432 for functional testing
CODE CLEANUP: Remove orphaned/duplicate code at lines 2249-2761 (dead code after st.stop())
Once PostgreSQL is available, re-run functional testing to verify drag-and-drop persistence

success_rate.frontend: CODE REVIEW ONLY - Cannot verify without database

context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL connection is required. The app fails immediately at startup if DB is unavailable. Code review shows implementation is correct but functional testing is blocked. Previous iteration (iteration_3.json) shows the drag-and-drop persistence was working when DB was available.

environment_blocker.error_message: connection to server at 'localhost' (127.0.0.1), port 5432 failed: Connection refused
environment_blocker.impact: App shows error and stops at startup - cannot test any functionality
environment_blocker.resolution_needed: Start PostgreSQL service or configure external database URL in DATABASE_URL env var

features_to_verify_when_db_available: Modo normal: contentores não arrastáveis - click opens inventory
Clique no contentor abre painel/modal de inventário sem navegar
Painel mostra: total palhetas, lotes (garanhão, proprietário, quantidade, canister, andar, observações)
Botão 'Editar mapa' ativa modo de arraste
Botão 'Salvar layout' persiste posições x,y e retorna ao modo normal
Layout desktop: descrição à esquerda, mapa à direita
Layout mobile: descrição acima, mapa largura total
